name: check_availability
description: Check available appointment time slots. Use this to find open slots to offer the caller. Optionally pass a preferred date if the caller mentions one.

preferred_date.description: Optional preferred date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If the caller says 'tomorrow' or 'next Monday', convert to the actual date.

execution_message: Let me check what we have available.

name: create_appointment
description: Book an appointment for the customer. Always collect customer info fresh — name, phone, email, and address. If the service type is duct cleaning, this tool will capture the info and flag it for a callback instead of booking. For emergencies, set is_emergency to true.

start_time.description: Appointment start time in HH:MM format (24-hour)

end_time.description: Appointment end time in HH:MM format (24-hour)

service_type.description: Type of HVAC service needed (e.g., AC Repair, Heating Repair, Maintenance, Installation, Duct Cleaning)

is_emergency.description: Whether this is an emergency service call

notes.description: Description of the problem or any additional notes

execution_message: I'm booking that for you right now.

name: transfer_emergency
description: Use this when the caller has an emergency (no AC, no heat, water leak) AND agrees to the $120 emergency fee. Collects their info, saves it to the system, and transfers the call to the on-call emergency technician. Do NOT call this if the customer declines the fee — schedule a regular appointment instead.

notes.description: Description of the emergency (no AC, no heat, water leak, etc.)

execution_message: Let me connect you with our emergency technician right away.
